title: Event Source Health Status
description: Health status of a configured event source, reflecting how well it is firing and whether it meets the seller's quality thresholds for optimization.

enumDescriptions.insufficient: Source is not firing or event volume is too low for optimization
enumDescriptions.minimum: Source works but data quality limits optimization effectiveness
enumDescriptions.good: Source meets quality thresholds for most optimization goals
enumDescriptions.excellent: Source exceeds quality thresholds across all dimensions
